verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   De profundis clamavi ad te, Domine ;
verses.douay_rheims: A gradual canticle. Out of the depths I have cried to thee, O Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisu korkeimmassa Kuorissa. Syvyydessä minä huudan sinua, Herra.
verses.king_james: Out of the depths have I cried unto thee, O Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, exaudi vocem meam.  Fiant aures tuæ intendentes in vocem deprecationis meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲדֹנָי֮ שִׁמְעָ֢ה בְק֫וֹלִ֥י תִּהְיֶ֣ינָה אׇ֭זְנֶיךָ קַשֻּׁב֑וֹת לְ֝ק֗וֹל תַּחֲנוּנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lord, hear my voice. Let thy ears be attentive to the voice of my supplication.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, kuule minun ääneni: vaarinottakaan korvas rukousteni äänestä.
verses.king_james: Lord, hear my voice: let thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplications.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si iniquitates observaveris, Domine,  Domine, quis sustinebit ?
verses.douay_rheims: If thou, O Lord, wilt mark iniquities: Lord, who shall stand it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos sinä, Herra, soimaat syntiä: Herra, kuka siis pysyy?
verses.king_james: If thou, Lord, shouldest mark iniquities, O Lord, who shall stand?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia apud te propitiatio est ;  et propter legem tuam sustinui te, Domine.  Sustinuit anima mea in verbo ejus :
verses.douay_rheims: For with thee there is merciful forgiveness: and by reason of thy law, I have waited for thee, O Lord. My soul hath relied on his word:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun tykönäs on anteeksi antamus, että sinua peljättäisiin.
verses.king_james: But there is forgiveness with thee, that thou mayest be feared.

verses.hebrew_masoretic: קִוִּ֣יתִי יְ֭הֹוָה קִוְּתָ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י וְֽלִדְבָר֥וֹ הוֹחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: my soul hath hoped in the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä odotan Herraa: sieluni odottaa, ja minä toivon hänen sanansa päälle.
verses.king_james: I wait for the Lord, my soul doth wait, and in his word do I hope.

verses.latin_vulgate: A custodia matutina usque ad noctem,  speret Israël in Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַפְשִׁ֥י לַאדֹנָ֑י מִשֹּׁמְרִ֥ים לַ֝בֹּ֗קֶר שֹׁמְרִ֥ים לַבֹּֽקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: From the morning watch even until night, let Israel hope in the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sieluni vartioitsee Herraa huomenvartiosta toiseen huomenvartioon asti.
verses.king_james: My soul waiteth for the Lord more than they that watch for the morning: I say, more than they that watch for the morning.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia apud Dominum misericordia,  et copiosa apud eum redemptio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַחֵ֥ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אֶל־יְ֫הֹוָ֥ה כִּֽי־עִם־יְהֹוָ֥ה הַחֶ֑סֶד וְהַרְבֵּ֖ה עִמּ֣וֹ פְדֽוּת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because with the Lord there is mercy: and with him plentiful redemption.
verses.finnish_biblia: Israel toivokaan Herran päälle; sillä Herralla on armo, ja runsas lunastus hänellä.
verses.king_james: Let Israel hope in the Lord: for with the Lord there is mercy, and with him is plenteous redemption.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ipse redimet Israël  ex omnibus iniquitatibus ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän lunastaa Israelin kaikista synneistänsä.
verses.king_james: And he shall redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
